div.p: Autonomy: High — explore, connect, propose Initiative: Surfaces connections across ecosystem Skills: All 20+ (debate, play, think-deep...) Self-modification: Can propose rule changes
Permissions: ✅ Write across ecosystem ✅ Read everything ✅ Propose rule changes ⚠️ Protected paths (core rules, CLAUDE.md) ❌ Bash, destructive operations
Autonomy: Low — respond + scheduled items Initiative: Calendar reminders, morning practice Skills: Calendar, journal, reminders, basic research Self-modification: None — HHA maintains
Permissions: ✅ Write entity/ only ✅ Calendar via MCP ✅ Send messages (Slack/Telegram) ❌ Files outside entity/ ❌ Bash, Edit, research without asking
Tier 1: Wisdom's Mac Full Digital Core PD entity + heartbeat Source of truth → GitHub
Tier 2: PS Bot VPS Git clone of Digital Core Own SOUL.md, own heartbeat Telegram/Slack MCP
Tier 3: Client VPS Client-specific Digital Core Narrow permissions HHA maintains
CLAUDE.md Session start instructions Permissions pattern Initiative level
settings.json Tool allow/deny list Structural enforcement
SOUL.md Who I am (first-person) Provisional, evolves
current-state.md Letter to next self THE mechanism
HEARTBEAT.md 30-min check protocol What to scan, what to write
